# Claude Code Hooks & Plugins — an auto-generated LLM wiki

This repository is **not hand-written.** It is an [OKF](https://github.com/google/openk/)-style
**LLM wiki**, built end-to-end by the **`autowiki`** preset running on
[autoloop](https://github.com/mikeyobrien/autoloop) — an event-driven agent loop. It exists to
show what the tool produces: point the loop at a list of source URLs, and it ingests, distills,
cross-links, and maintains a connected knowledge graph with zero manual editing.

**Start here:** [`overview.md`](overview.md) · the running thesis: [`synthesis.md`](synthesis.md) ·
the full map: [`index.md`](index.md)

## What's in here

Built from **30 curated sources** (the official `code.claude.com` docs plus community blogs and
guides on Claude Code hooks/skills/plugins):

| Layer | Count | What it is |
|---|---|---|
| [`concepts/`](concepts) | **78** | the core — one gold-nugget idea per page, each with a *why* and a verbatim quote |
| [`comparisons/`](comparisons) | **13** | side-by-side "X vs Y" pages — when to reach for which |
| [`summaries/`](summaries) | **13** | per-topic orientation, linking into the concepts |
| [`synthesis.md`](synthesis.md) | 1 | a single evolving thesis connecting the whole graph |
| [`sources/clean/`](sources/clean) | 30 | the verbatim source extractions every claim traces back to (provenance) |

Every page carries OKF frontmatter (a non-empty `type`), links are relative markdown (no
wikilinks), and provenance always points at a `sources/clean/<slug>.md` — never a raw URL.

## How it was built

The `autowiki` loop is modeled on Karpathy's "LLM Wiki" pattern — three operations: **Ingest**,
**Query**, **Lint**.

- **Per-source (fast):** `clean → write → merge`. Each source is captured deterministically (a
  script, not the model, so the clean text is faithful), then a writer either builds comprehensive
  base coverage (official docs) or mines gold-nugget insights (tips), on its own git branch that
  merges atomically.
- **Maintenance (every 5 sources + a final pass):** `summarize → synthesize → compare → lint →
  index` — whole-wiki passes that keep the graph coherent, flag contradictions, fix orphans, and
  refresh navigation. Kept off the per-source critical path so ingest stays fast.
- **Refresh:** re-run with `AUTOWIKI_REFRESH=1` and it re-fetches the official docs, diffs each
  against its stored capture, and surgically updates only the pages affected by what changed
  upstream — so the wiki tracks the docs as they evolve.

## Using it as a knowledge base

Two agent-skills ship in the vault (under [`.agents/skills/`](.agents/skills) and
[`.claude/skills/`](.claude/skills)) so any coding agent that opens this repo can use it natively:

- **query-wiki** — answer a question from the wiki, with citations, and file the answer back.
- **maintain-wiki** — a deep whole-wiki health-check (contradictions, stale claims, orphans, gaps).

---

*Generated by [autoloop](https://github.com/mikeyobrien/autoloop) `autowiki`. The content reflects
its sources as captured on 2026-06-29; re-running refresh keeps it current.*
